div.head: The Secretary of State to the Consul General at Shanghai (Lockhart)
div.p: 472. Your 1066, August 4, 9 p.m., to the Ambassador and Hankow’s 398, August 4, 11 a.m.,Neither printed. The Ambassador and the Consul General at Shanghai recommended that Allison be authorized to take the action he proposed in his telegram No. 145, August 4, 2 p.m., p. 428. in regard to Nanking’s 145, August 4, 2 p.m. The Department approves your recommendation in regard to action by Allison and desires that you promptly and vigorously take this case up with the appropriate Japanese authorities at Shanghai.
Repeat to Tokyo those portions of Nanking’s 145 which contain the facts in regard to the situation.
